failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch invocation was malformed: product_id was passed as an integer 0 instead of the required string "1968349452", and item_id "2177997696" was omitted.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the required item_id and product_id available from the Coordinator plan, but the actual ProductCatalogSearch call used an ill-formed payload: {"product_id": 0}. The tool explicitly returned a SchemaError stating that catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id. This is not a connectivity, access, or guardrail issue.
